retrieved_result: Types of Networks: LAN, WAN, WLAN, MAN, SAN, PAN, EPN & VPN There are so many different types of computer networks in existence, it can be hard to understand the differences between them, particularly the ones with very similar-sounding names. This lesson explains the structures and functions of some of the most popular computer networks. Types of Networks T
